title: Player Heads With Effects
description: Player Heads With Effects is a Minecraft Plugin That Drops Player Heads With Unique Potion Effects When Players Are Killed!
body:
# Player Heads With Effects Plugin

## Overview
Player Heads With Effects is a Minecraft plugin that drops player heads with unique potion effects when players are killed. The plugin provides an engaging gameplay experience where players can collect heads with special abilities.

## Features
- Drops player heads with unique potion effects on death
- Effects are randomly assigned and don't repeat until all are used
- PVP and PVE death support
- Customizable drop chances and messages
- Colorful broadcast messages
- Head wearing grants temporary potion effects
- **IMPROVED TIMER SYSTEM**:
  - Each individual head has its own cooldown timer
  - Once a head's effect is used, that specific head goes on cooldown
  - Trying to rewear the same head during cooldown:
    - Shows "Wait for Xs" message in chat
    - Head stays in inventory (doesn't disappear)
    - Head is not equipped (prevented from being worn)
  - Different heads can be used immediately (no cross-head cooldown)
  - If cooldown is set to 0, no timer restrictions apply (unlimited use)
- **PER-PLAYER HEAD LIMITS**:
  - Configurable maximum heads per player for PVP and PVE
  - Automatic reset periods for head counts
  - Detailed player statistics tracking
- **ADVANCED EFFECT MANAGEMENT**:
  - Enhanced error handling and logging
  - Persistent effect tracking and statistics
  - Better user experience with informative messages

## Commands
- `/headleft` - Shows which potion effects are still available (for all players)
- `/headreset` - Resets the system so drops start again (OP only)
- `/headreload` - Reloads all configuration files (OP only)
- `/headget` - Get a head with a specific effect for testing (OP only)

## Configuration
The plugin generates configuration files on first run:

### `heads.yml` - Controls head drop settings:
- **PVP Settings**:
  - `enabled`: Enable/disable PVP head drops
  - `drop-chance`: Percentage chance for heads to drop (0-100)
  - `per-player-head-limit`: Maximum heads per player (-1 for unlimited)
  - `limit-reset-period`: Hours before limit resets (0 for no reset)
  - Customizable drop messages and head lore

- **PVE Settings**:
  - `enabled`: Enable/disable PVE head drops
  - `drop-chance`: Percentage chance for heads to drop (0-100)
  - `per-player-head-limit`: Maximum heads per player (-1 for unlimited)
  - `limit-reset-period`: Hours before limit resets (0 for no reset)
  - `allowed-causes`: List of death causes that drop heads
  - Customizable drop messages

### `effects.yml` - Defines potion effects and timer settings:
- `effect-duration`: How long effects last (default 15 seconds)
- `head-cooldown`: Delay before same head can be used again (default 25 seconds, set to 0 for no cooldown)
- List of available potion effects with levels

## Author Information
- **Creator**: KakashiPlayz!
- **Portfolio Website**: https://kakashiplayz.vercel.app
- **Discord Server**: https://discord.gg/QdTN4BFkTv

## Plugin Version
1.0.0

## Compatibility
Works with Minecraft versions 1.13 and above.
Compatible with Spigot, Paper, and Bukkit servers.
Works alongside other popular plugins.

## Installation
1. Place the JAR file in your server's `plugins` folder
2. Restart the server
3. The plugin will generate configuration files on first run
4. Customize settings in the generated config files as needed

## Support
For issues or questions, join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/QdTN4BFkTv
